acceptance.proof: Two pinned repeats per supported direction bind exactly one IPv4 group/interface, finite retry/deadline behavior, and cleanup without raw publication.
Platform scope, hashes, provenance, limitations, damage, and public/private boundaries are exact.
Standard policy, public boundary, documentation, instructions, and workflow contracts pass.

commit_policy: Commit lifecycle separately; keep drivers/raw packets/endpoints/interface identifiers/diagnostics private; publish only sanitized evidence after complete pinned repeats.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Bound the exact observation and nonclaims.
Separate measured multicast behavior from runtime implementation.
Bind private black-box provenance and platform limits by hashes.
Existing discovery ownership and public/private guidance applies.
Existing observation-before-runtime and authority guidance applies.

non_scope: Production multicast or discovery implementation, activation/API/lock changes, other groups, IPv6, interface enumeration or default selection, non-loopback interfaces, background discovery, unbounded retries, devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, copied source, commands, stream admission, or Manifold authority.
objective: Observe only pinned-official finite host behavior for the single documented IPv4 multicast discovery group 239.255.172.215:16571 on one explicit loopback interface, including membership, query/response directionality, bounded retry timing, deadline, cleanup, and sanitized platform limitations without changing runtime.
outputs: Private finite black-box drivers/results retained outside the repository.

Sanitized addressable evidence for exactly one IPv4 group, port, explicit loopback interface, bounded attempts/deadline, membership cleanup, and platform limitation after two pinned repeats per supported direction.
Damaged public fixture/checker and documentation/policy routes if observation is complete.
